title: stilbocarpa polaris
side_effects: Stilbocarpa polaris can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's toxic compounds can lead to headaches, nausea, and vomiting. Additionally, prolonged exposure to stilbocarpa's essential oils can cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. It is essential to use stilbocarpa polaris under the guidance of a medical professional or a qualified herbalist to avoid these potential side effects.
